skill.prompt.inspect_dataset: Show an overview of the current dataset
skill.prompt.assess_dataset: Assess the preprocessing state of the current dataset
skill.prompt.summarize_qc: Summarize QC metrics for the current object
skill.prompt.plot_qc_metrics: Plot QC metric distributions for the current object
skill.prompt.filter_cells: Filter cells by QC thresholds in the current object
skill.prompt.filter_genes: Filter genes by expression thresholds in the current object
skill.prompt.normalize_total: Apply total-count normalization to the current object
skill.prompt.log1p_transform: Apply log1p transform to the current object
skill.prompt.select_hvg: Select highly variable genes for the current object
skill.prompt.scale_matrix: Scale the expression matrix of the current object
skill.prompt.run_pca: Compute PCA for the current object
skill.prompt.compute_neighbors: Compute the neighbor graph for the current object
skill.prompt.run_umap: Compute UMAP for the current object
skill.prompt.prepare_umap: Run standard preprocessing and generate UMAP for the current object
skill.prompt.subset_cells: Subset a group of cells from the current object
skill.prompt.subcluster_from_global: Keep the global object unchanged and subcluster a specific group
skill.prompt.score_gene_set: Score a gene set for the current object
skill.prompt.reanalyze_subset: Re-run subcluster analysis on the extracted subset
skill.prompt.subcluster_group: Extract one or more groups and recluster
skill.prompt.rename_clusters: Rename cluster labels in the current object
skill.prompt.find_markers: Find marker genes for the current object
skill.prompt.plot_umap: Plot the UMAP of the current object
skill.prompt.plot_gene_umap: Plot the gene expression UMAP for the current object
skill.prompt.run_python_analysis: Run a custom Python analysis on the current object
skill.prompt.plot_dotplot: Plot a marker dotplot for the current object
skill.prompt.plot_violin: Plot a gene violin chart for the current object
skill.prompt.plot_heatmap: Plot a gene expression heatmap for the current object
skill.prompt.plot_celltype_composition: Plot cell-type composition by sample or condition
skill.prompt.export_h5ad: Export the current object as h5ad
skill.prompt.export_markers_csv: Export current marker results as CSV

ui.uploadSuccess: {name} attached as {label} to the current workspace.
ui.dblclickRename: Double-click to rename; right-click for options
ui.helpNewWorkspaceDesc: Create an isolated workspace. Suitable for new datasets or starting fresh.
ui.helpNewConversationDesc: Reuse current workspace objects and results; open a new chat thread.
ui.newConversationTitle: Keep current workspace objects and results; open a new chat thread
ui.newWorkspaceTitle: Create an isolated workspace for new datasets or analysis
ui.confirmDeleteWorkspaceMsg: All conversations, objects, and result files in this workspace will be removed. This cannot be undone.
ui.confirmDeleteConversationMsg: Messages, job records, and associated results will be removed. This cannot be undone.
ui.name: Name
ui.clickSkillHint: Click a skill to fill its suggested prompt into the input.
ui.skillHubDesc: Plugin installation, enable/disable, and built-in skill toggles are managed on the dedicated Skill Hub page.
ui.workspaceFilesTooltip: {label} has {objectCount} h5ad files and {artifactCount} result files
ui.workspaceFilesEmpty: No files in this workspace yet
ui.fileListHint: Objects and results produced in this workspace
ui.selectFileForDetail: Select a file to view details
ui.pluginManagerDesc: Manage built-in skills and external plugin packages, including upload, refresh, disable and re-enable.
hub.selectZipFirst: Please select a zip plugin package first.
hub.noBundles: No skill bundles yet. Upload a zip plugin to get started.
hub.builtinNote: Disabling this will remove the default preprocessing, UMAP, marker, and export capabilities from the planner and runtime.
hub.skillListHint: Click a skill to view its detailed specification in a modal
hub.noSelectionHint: Expand a bundle in the list, then click any skill to view its description, parameter specification, output conventions, and runtime configuration.
hub.targetObjectsHint: The planner selects this skill based on these object types.
hub.noInputParams: This skill has no extra input parameters and typically depends only on the target object.
hub.noOutputFields: This skill has no explicitly declared output fields.
hub.runtimeNote: This skill uses the following runtime configuration. Focus on the entry script, callable, and runtime type.
hub.builtinRuntimeNote: This is a built-in skill. No standalone runtime configuration is exposed; execution is handled by the system planner and Python runtime.
hub.builtinRuntimeHint: To understand its specification, focus on input parameters, output conventions, target objects, and support level.
html.composerPlaceholder: e.g.: Subset T cells, recluster, then plot markers
html.pluginsDesc: Manage built-in skills and external plugin packages: upload, refresh, disable, and re-enable.
html.summaryDesc: Summary of skill bundles and loaded skills.
html.managementDesc: Upload a zip plugin package or refresh the Skill Hub.
html.mainDesc: Skills are listed in the bundle area. Expand a bundle to see all skills. Click any skill to view its specification in a modal. Press ESC to close.
html.bundleSectionDesc: Enable or disable built-in bundles and external plugins. Expand a card to view its skills.
html.skillDetailHint: Press ESC to close; use arrow keys to switch skills
diag.noAnnotationDetected: No cell type or cluster annotation detected.
error.restoreObjectMissingPath: Missing materialized path when restoring object.
error.restoreObjectFileNotFound: Materialized file not found when restoring object: {path}
error.filterCellsNoThreshold: Please specify at least one cell filtering threshold.
error.filterCellsEmpty: No cells remaining after filtering. Please adjust thresholds.
error.filterGenesNoThreshold: Please specify at least one gene filtering threshold.
error.filterGenesEmpty: No genes remaining after filtering. Please adjust thresholds.
error.missingPCA: Current object is missing PCA. Please run run_pca first.
error.missingNeighborGraph: Current object is missing neighbor graph. Please run compute_neighbors first.
error.missingRawCounts: Current object lacks raw counts for preprocessing. Please provide a raw matrix or h5ad with raw layer.
error.missingClusterField: Current object has no available cluster field.
error.missingObsField: Current object is missing obs field `{field}`.
error.subclusterTooFewCellsGenes: Subclustering requires at least 3 cells and 3 genes.
error.subclusterDimensionsTooSmall: Object dimensions too small after HVG selection to continue PCA/neighbors/UMAP.
error.subclusterTooFewComponents: Subclustering requires at least 2 principal components. Check cell and gene counts after filtering.
error.genesNotFound: Requested genes not found in current object: {genes}.
error.atLeastOneGeneRequired: At least one gene is required.
error.missingUMAPForPlot: Current object is missing `X_umap`. Please run run_umap first.
error.missingExportableTable: Result object `{label}` has no exportable table file.
error.skillDisabled: Skill `{skill}` is currently disabled in Skill Hub.
error.subsetEmpty: Subset is empty. Please check filter criteria.
error.subclusterSubsetEmpty: Subcluster subset is empty. Please check filter criteria.
error.missingPCAForRecluster: Current object is missing `X_pca`. Please run run_pca first.
error.subclusterGroupRequiresGroups: subcluster_group requires a non-empty groups list.
error.subclusterGroupSubsetEmpty: subcluster_group subset is empty. Please check groups.
error.plotUmapNotObsField: Obs field `{field}` does not exist; cannot color UMAP.
error.plotGeneUmapNoGenes: Please specify at least one gene.
error.compositionNoData: No valid data for the given grouping conditions.
error.plotQcMetricsNoMetrics: plot_qc_metrics has no plottable QC metrics.
error.pluginMissingEntrypoint: Plugin skill `{skill}` is missing entry script: {entrypoint}
error.pluginNoTargetForPersist: Current plugin skill has no target object to persist.
error.pluginMissingCallable: Plugin skill `{skill}` does not define callable entry `{callable_name}`.
error.pluginReturnMustBeDict: Plugin skill `{skill}` must return a dict.
runtime.workerIsolated: Stopped the current task and isolated its working directory.
runtime.filterCellsSummary: Applied cell filtering to {label} ({thresholds}), kept {kept} cells, removed {removed}.
runtime.filterGenesSummary: Applied gene filtering to {label} ({thresholds}), kept {kept} genes, removed {removed}.
runtime.selectHvgSummary: Selected highly variable genes for {label} (n_top_genes={n_top_genes}, actual {n_hvg}).
runtime.prepareUmapSummary: Completed standard preprocessing for {label} and generated PCA, neighbor graph, and UMAP.
runtime.subclusterFromGlobalSummary: Kept {label} unchanged and performed subcluster analysis on {n_obs} cells where {obs_field}={value}. Pipeline: normalize, log1p, HVG, PCA, neighbors, UMAP, and Leiden (resolution={resolution}).
runtime.scoreGeneSetSummary: Computed gene set score for {label} and stored in obs field `{score_name}`.
runtime.reanalyzeSubsetSummary: Re-analyzed subset {label} with low-count-friendly pipeline. Pipeline: normalize, log1p, HVG, PCA, neighbors, UMAP, and Leiden (resolution={resolution}).
runtime.subclusterGroupSummary: Extracted {groupby}={groups} from {label} ({n_obs} cells) and completed subcluster re-analysis (resolution={resolution}).
runtime.renameClustersSummary: Renamed `{groupby}` category labels in {label}, applied {count} mappings.
runtime.qcMtPrefixNotDetected: No mitochondrial gene prefix detected; pct_counts_mt set to 0.
runtime.plotGeneUmapNoGenes: Please specify at least one gene.
runtime.plotCompositionSummary: Generated cell composition plot for {label} (groupby={groupby}, split_by={split_by}).
runtime.customAnalysisWithTable: Completed custom analysis on {target_label}, results written to table {output_label}.
runtime.customAnalysisWithObject: Completed custom analysis on {target_label} and generated object {output_label}.
runtime.customAnalysisWithObjectFallback: Completed custom Python analysis on {label} and generated object {output_label}.
runtime.customPlotArtifactSummary: Plot generated by custom Python analysis.
runtime.customTableArtifactSummary: Table generated by custom Python analysis.
runtime.exportMarkersCsvArtifactSummary: Marker / differential expression result export file.
runtime.pluginPlotArtifactSummary: Plot generated by Skill Hub plugin.
runtime.pluginTableArtifactSummary: Table generated by Skill Hub plugin.
